[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111010111 8
1 1110101111 8
2 1011111111 9
3 0011111111 8
4 1111010111 8
5 1110101111 8
6 1011111111 9
7 0011111111 8
